channel.title: GitHub CSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CSS in GitHub

item.title: animate-css/animate.css
item.description: 🍿 A cross-browser library of CSS animations. As easy to use as an easy thing.

item.title: lowlighter/matcha
item.description: 🍵 Drop-in semantic styling library in pure CSS. Highly customizable and perfect for simple websites and prototyping web apps!

item.title: kepano/flexoki
item.description: An inky color scheme for prose and code.

item.title: adobe-fonts/source-code-pro
item.description: Monospaced font family for user interface and coding environments

item.title: bradtraversy/50projects50days
item.description: 50+ mini web projects using HTML, CSS & JS

item.title: McShelby/hugo-theme-relearn
item.description: A theme for Hugo designed for documentation

item.title: moveit/moveit2_tutorials
item.description: A sphinx-based centralized documentation repo for MoveIt 2

item.title: cssnano/cssnano
item.description: A modular minifier, built on top of the PostCSS ecosystem.

item.title: lipis/flag-icons
item.description: 🎏 A curated collection of all country flags in SVG — plus the CSS for easier integration
